"C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\windows_edr_lite.dir/objects.a
C:\PATH_Programs\mingw32\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\windows_edr_lite.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\windows_edr_lite.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PATH_Programs\mingw32\bin\cc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\windows_edr_lite.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o windows_edr_lite.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libwindows_edr_lite.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\windows_edr_lite.dir\linkLibs.rsp
